zh.Gresham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可格雷沙姆
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III於1141年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷沙姆。她於1170年之前與Richard de Braunche III在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Gresham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可格雷沙姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III于1141年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷沙姆。她于1170年之前与Richard de Braunche III在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Marcel.

French: topographic name or nickname from Old French branche ‘branch’ (from Late Latin branca ‘foot, paw’), of uncertain application (compare German Zweig ); or a habitational name from (La) Branche, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare also Labranche .
English: variant of   Branch  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Zweig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Isadore, Yochanan, Akiva, Arie, Aron, Elchanan, Hyman, Moishe, Moshe, Shimon.  German Gerd, Hans, Manfred, Reinhold, Arnulf, Herta, Kurt.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German zwīg ‘branch, bough, twig, graft’, German Zweig, applied perhaps as a nickname for a new member in a family, offspring or as an occupational name for a horticultural expert. The Jewish surname is artificial. Compare Branch .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III was born in 1141, in Gresham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard de Braunche III before 1170, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III est née en 1141, à Gresham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard de Braunche III avant 1170, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III wurde 1141 in Gresham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat vor 1170 in Europa Richard de Braunche III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III è nata il nel 1141 nel Gresham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard de Braunche III prima del 1170, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルク
ja.Gresham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクグレシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche IIIは1141年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレシャムで生まれた。1170年以前にヨーロッパでRichard de Braunche IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III(은)는 1141년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레샤에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1170년 이전 우럽에서 Richard de Braunche III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III nasceu em 1141, em Gresham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard de Braunche III antes 1170, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III родилась в 1141 г. в местности грешам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Braunche III перед 1170 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Braunche III nació en 1141, en Gresham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard de Braunche III antes de 1170, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
